meta.name: Discussion then ready (Wave 1, issue #134)
meta.description: Exercises the per-submission intent + ready-quorum gate. The creator (CISO) sends two discuss-intent messages — each updates the transcript without flipping the AI to advance — then a ready-intent message which closes the quorum and triggers the AI's next beat. Single-active-role flow keeps the scenario robust against any mock-LLM that yields to one role at a time.

scenario_prompt: Ransomware via vendor portal — finance laptops impacted at 03:14 Wed. Drill: confirm intent gating works.

submissions.content: Quick check before I commit — are we treating the vendor portal as compromised end-to-end, or just the affected laptops? Want my containment scope to match the call.
Worth confirming with Legal whether disclosure clock starts at detection or at confirmed exfil. That changes the timeline in the Comms draft.

OK — treat the portal as compromised end-to-end. Isolate the affected laptops, pull IR Lead, start the regulator-notification clock. Comms drafts a holding statement with 'investigation ongoing' framing.
Containment verified. Move to recovery planning. Document timeline for the AAR.
